items.title: MCP servers for IDE workflows
items.why: What MCP servers, IDE configs, or CLI workflows have reproducible setup guides?
how_to_steps: Skim for prerequisites and install commands
Apply the workflow on a small branch before team rollout
Measure cycle time or defect rate for one week
items.evidence: repo or docs with setup steps
